channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Netherlands Returns 1,000-Year-Old Chola Copper Plates to India During PM Modi's Visit
item.description: In a joyous cultural moment, Prime Minister Narendra Modi announced the repatriation of ancient Chola copper plates from the Netherlands to India. These 1,000-year-old artefacts, consisting of 21 larg...

item.title: Chelsea Agree Four-Year Deal to Appoint Xabi Alonso as New Manager
item.description: Chelsea Football Club don reportedly agree deal to appoint former Real Madrid and Bayer Leverkusen coach, Xabi Alonso, as their new manager. According to reports from The Athletic, Alonso don already ...

item.title: Trump's Visit to China Yields Minimal Progress on Strait of Hormuz Access
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump returned from a visit to China this week without achieving significant progress on reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a key global shipping route for oil. Iran has shown littl...

item.title: Tshisekedi seeks support from evangelical churches to counter Catholic opposition in DRC
item.description: In Democratic Republic of Congo, President Félix Tshisekedi is seeking political support from evangelical and revivalist churches as he considers a possible bid for a third term in office. This move c...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns prepare to overcome last season's CAF Champions League final loss against AS FAR
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns are determined to set right the painful defeat they suffered in last season's CAF Champions League final against Pyramids. According to defender Divine Lunga, the team has learnt fro...

item.title: Manchester City claim FA Cup with 1-0 victory over Chelsea thanks to Semenyo's goal
item.description: Manchester City secured the FA Cup title on Saturday by defeating Chelsea 1-0 in the final at Wembley. The decisive moment came in the 72nd minute when Ghanaian forward Antoine Semenyo produced a clev...

item.title: Tobi Amusan clocks season-best 12.41s to finish third at Diamond League Shanghai
item.description: Tobi Amusan, our Nigerian sprint hurdler and world record holder, started her 2026 athletics season strong with a third-place finish in the women’s 100m hurdles at the Diamond League meet in Shanghai,...

item.title: Nectar Social Secures $30 Million Series A to Expand AI Marketing Platform
item.description: Nectar Social, an AI-powered marketing operating system, announced a $30 million Series A funding round led by Menlo Ventures and its Anthology Fund, affiliated with Anthropic. Founded by former Meta ...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Look at Coco Martin and Julia Montes in the Making of 'Sigabo'
item.description: Fans of Filipino entertainment are treated to an exclusive behind-the-scenes glimpse of the upcoming TV series “Sigabo,” featuring popular actors Coco Martin and Julia Montes. The photos shared by ABS...

item.title: Thailand and Cambodia escalate maritime border dispute amid past conflicts
item.description: Thailand and Cambodia are once again at odds, this time over their maritime boundaries in the Gulf of Thailand. Last year, the two countries engaged in brief but deadly clashes over their 800-kilometr...

item.title: Saboti MP Endorses Edwin Sifuna as Opposition’s Preferred Candidate for 2027
item.description: Saboti MP Caleb Amisi has publicly backed Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna as the strongest candidate for the opposition to challenge President William Ruto in the 2027 general election. Speaking in his c...

item.title: Gift Leotlela of South Africa wins men's 100m at Diamond League opener in China
item.description: South African sprinter Gift Leotlela pulled off a significant victory by winning the men's 100m at the opening Diamond League meeting of the season in Keqiao, Shaoxing, China. He edged out a strong fi...

item.title: Union Minister's Son Surrenders in Sexual Assault Case Under POCSO Act
item.description: Bandi Sai Bhageerath, son of a Union minister, was arrested in Narsingi, Telangana, in connection with a case under the Protection of Children from Sexual Offences (POCSO) Act. The case was filed foll...

item.title: KUCCPS Portal Open for First Revision of University and College Applications
item.description: The Kenya Universities and Colleges Central Placement Service (KUCCPS) has officially reopened its application portal for Form Four leavers who have not yet secured placement in universities or colleg...

item.title: Tanzania and Russia Reach Agreement to Teach Kiswahili in Russian Universities
item.description: The governments of Tanzania and Russia have reached an important agreement to introduce the teaching of Kiswahili language in various universities across Russia. This move aims to strengthen cultural ...

item.title: Critics Condemn Angus Taylor's Migration Remarks as Politically Motivated
item.description: The Canberra Times published a series of letters to the editor responding to comments made by Opposition Leader Angus Taylor regarding migration and housing. Critics argue that Taylor's claims of a 'm...

item.title: Buster Keaton Tested His Voice for the Transition to Talking Films
item.description: In the late 1920s, silent film legend Buster Keaton undertook an unusual yet practical task: he listened to recordings of his own voice to ensure it matched the persona that had made him famous, the s...

item.title: U.S. and Nigerian Forces Confirm Death of ISIS Deputy Leader in Africa
item.description: U.S. and Nigerian forces have successfully killed Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, the second-in-command of ISIS, in a joint military operation in the Lake Chad Basin, according to statements from former U.S. Pre...

item.title: Minority Senators Call for Thorough Investigation into Senate Shooting Incident
item.description: Minority senators in the Philippine Senate have called for a formal investigation following a shooting incident that occurred at the Senate premises on Wednesday night. Senator Bam Aquino filed a reso...

item.title: FDA and NBI Warn Public Against Fake Tirzepatide Sold as Weight Loss Drug
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) of the Philippines, together with the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI), issued a strong warning to the public regarding the sale of counterfeit tirzepatide...
